# Aerovora Industries — Drone-as-a-Service Agreement

## Terms (Auto-Generated by Sales-CRM Agent)

---

### Service Tiers

| Tier | Monthly | Commitment | Drones | Support | Data |
|------|---------|------------|--------|---------|------|
| Scout | $800/mo | 12 months | 1 | Business hours | Basic telemetry |
| Grower | $1,800/mo | 12 months | 3 | 24/7 AI | Full analytics |
| Swarm | $2,500/mo/drone | 24 months | 10+ | 24/7 AI + field service | All data + API access |

### Included Services
- Drone hardware + all payload modules
- Battery swap station (Grower/Swarm only)
- AI monitoring and autonomous operations
- Over-the-air software updates
- Replacement unit within 24h for any failure

### Customer Obligations
- Provide 4G/5G connectivity on-site
- Designate landing zone (3m x 3m clear area)
- Allow autonomous charging station installation
- No modification of drone hardware/software
